findings.description: `CognitoRSAKeyProvider.getPrivateKey()` throws `UnsupportedOperationException` ("公開鍵のみ取得可能であるため、秘密鍵の取得はサポートしない") and `getPrivateKeyId()` returns `null` ("未定義であるためインタフェースの仕様に則り null を返却する") are both omitted. These are part of the `RSAKeyProvider` interface contract and convey that this implementation only supports public key operations.

The debug logging in the catch block of `verifyIdToken` is omitted. Source logs the verification failure via `LOGGER.logDebug(...)` before throwing `HttpErrorResponse`. The knowledge file's code snippet shows only the throw statement, omitting the conditional debug log pattern.
`RSAPublicKey` (return type of `getPublicKeyById`) and `RSAPrivateKey` (return type of `getPrivateKey`) are PascalCase class names referenced in the source but absent from hints.
findings.source_evidence:
public RSAPublicKey getPublicKeyById(String keyId) { ... }
public RSAPrivateKey getPrivateKey() { ... }

findings.description: `SystemRepository` (used in `SystemRepository.get("idTokenVerifier")`), `ExecutionContext` (parameter type in `login` method), and `HttpResponse` (used in `HttpResponse.Status.UNAUTHORIZED.getStatusCode()`) are class names present in the source code for this section but missing from hints.
